name: Ghost Beneficiary — held in trust by {{RELATION}}
description:
{{RELATION}} named this wallet as a beneficiary on Ghost Protocol — a trustless dead-man's-switch for digital assets on Solana. THIS IS NOT AN INSTANT PAYOUT.

— WHEN YOU CAN CLAIM —
You can ONLY claim the assets that were set aside for you if ONE of these is true:
  (a) {{RELATION}}'s check-in timer expires (they stopped pinging the protocol — usually because they lost their wallet, became incapacitated, or passed away), OR
  (b) {{RELATION}} explicitly named you as a recovery wallet and triggers payout.

Until one of those happens, the assets stay with {{RELATION}}. This token is just the key — keep it safe.

— STATUS —
Active. (If {{RELATION}} ever removes you as a beneficiary, this token's metadata will be updated to show STATUS: REVOKED. Always check the on-chain status before assuming you can claim.)

— HOW TO CLAIM (when the time comes) —
1. Visit: {{CLAIM_URL}}
2. Connect this wallet (the one holding this NFT).
3. The dApp checks on-chain whether the conditions are met. If they are, you'll be walked through claiming.

— IF THE WEBSITE IS DOWN —
Mirror: {{IPFS_MIRROR_URL}}
GitHub: {{GITHUB_PAGES_URL}}

— PASTE THIS INTO CLAUDE / CHATGPT IF YOU NEED HELP —
I hold a Ghost Protocol Beneficiary NFT on Solana. Program ID: {{PROGRAM_ID}}. Owner wallet: {{OWNER_PUBKEY}}. My beneficiary index: {{BENEFICIARY_INDEX}}. Please fetch the program's IDL from a Solana RPC, derive the Ghost PDA from seed ["ghost", owner_pubkey], read the on-chain Ghost state to verify (a) my pubkey is still in the beneficiaries array, AND (b) either the check-in deadline has passed OR a recovery action was triggered. If both are true, construct the execute_legacy + execute_transfer instructions and tell me how to sign and broadcast.

Ghost Protocol lives on Solana mainnet — this website is not required for the protocol to function.

attributes.value: No — only on owner timer expiry or recovery trigger
